title: epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. conquensis
intro: Epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. conquensis, also known as the Iberian helleborine, is a hybrid species of orchid that is endemic to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epipactis × conquensis nothosubsp. conquensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
